src: A sleek gray cat with short fur and bright green eyes. It has pointed ears and whiskers that fan out.
edit: A majestic marble feline statue with white and grey veining, smooth surface, and verdant green marble eyes. The ears are finely chiseled, and it poses with poised elegance.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: the object upright on a light wood floor, viewed from above, slightly looking to the top left. A thick rope runs beside it, and the floor has subtle wood grain patterns.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The object lies on its side on a light wood floor, paws forward, head turned to the bottom right corner, surrounded by leather straps. The room has soft lighting, a modern interior, and a couch in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: the object is lying on a patterned bedspread, front legs extended and upper body raised, looking to the side, with a light background and dark abstract shapes; a headboard and lamp are visible in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The object sits upright on a white shelf with all four paws visible, looking slightly to the side, surrounded by a vase of pastel tulips and framed artwork in a softly lit modern minimalist room.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: The object is lying on a dark blanket on a window sill, body stretched along the fabric, gazing through a rain-speckled window. Soft light highlights the blanket texture and raindrops.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: An object rests on a rustic oak floor, viewed from above, with amber and gold hues. A robust rope runs parallel along the floor, showcasing deep wood grain textures. Floorboard patterns echo fallen leaves, providing an autumnal touch.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The object rests on its side on a floor of amber and gold leaves. Its paws extend forward, head turned to the bottom right. Leather straps encircle it in earthy tones. A couch with harvest-hued fabrics is in the room.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: The object rests on a bedspread with rich autumn hues, its front legs extended, upper body elevated, gazing to the side. In the background, a wooden headboard and a lamp add a warm glow.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: The object is upright on a wooden shelf, all four paws visible, looking slightly to the side. It's surrounded by a vase of orange, red, and golden tulips and framed artwork of autumn landscapes. The room is softly lit with golden tones and earthy decor.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: The object lies on a russet blanket on a window sill, gazing out at a rain-speckled window. Autumnal light casts a glow on the blanket and raindrops. Outside, earthy tones and rain create an autumn ambiance.
